ai_summary: Waterways Leisure Tourism Limited will hold a Board meeting on July 10, 2026, to consider a stock split (sub-division of face value of equity shares), a corporate action typically aimed at enhancing share liquidity and retail investor accessibility without altering fundamental value. No immediate red flags are present, but the company also noted its trading window for insiders is closed from July 1st in anticipation of its unaudited Q1 FY27 financial results.
